primary_detection.name: Character Replacement Obfuscation
primary_detection.description: Malicious commands hidden using placeholder characters removed via replace() or regex

underlying_threats.name: Remote Code Execution
underlying_threats.description: Downloads and executes remote payload scripts

underlying_threats.name: Dynamic Code Execution
underlying_threats.description: Uses exec() to run dynamically constructed code

underlying_threats.name: Shell Command Injection
underlying_threats.description: Executes shell commands via subprocess and os.system

obfuscation_indicators: Regex substitution with re.sub() for pattern removal
verdict_reasoning: Systematic use of placeholder characters and replace() operations to obscure malicious command keywords
